questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a Name any two elements of the micro marketing environment. 2.5 b What is the difference between a need and a want? 2.5 c What is a core product? Give an example. 2.5 d What is skimming price strategy? 2.5 e Define vertical marketing system . 2.5 f What is the role of a wholesaler? 2.5 g Mention any two tools of sales promotion. 2.5 h What is public relations in the context of promotion? 2.5
Explain the importance of marketing in today’s competitive environment and differentiate between the internal and external environment. 10
Differentiate between marketing and selling with examples. 10
Discuss the stages of the product life cycle and their marketing implications. 10
Describe any three product mix pricing strategies with examples. 10
Describe different types of marketing channels with examples. 10
Explain the concept and strategy behind multichannel marketing. 10

subparts.text: What are the elements of the promotion mix? Explain each briefly.
Differentiate between push and pull strategies with examples. 10

questions.question_text: Explain the advantages and limitations of advertising as a promotional tool. 10
